query: Turn this Markdown README into a Confluence page.
expected_behavior: Maps headings/code/lists per references/markdown-mapping.md (does not repeat the title as H1)
Emits code blocks as the code macro with a language parameter and CDATA
Converts blockquotes/notes to panel macros rather than literal '>'
Returns valid storage-format XHTML for confluence-draft, without publishing

query: How should I show an ADR's status and a warning callout on the page?
expected_behavior: Uses a coloured status lozenge for the ADR state (e.g. Green/ACCEPTED)
Uses a warning panel for the callout
References storage-format-macros.md for the exact macro syntax

query: Embed an architecture diagram in the page.
expected_behavior: Recommends uploading the rendered diagram as an attachment and referencing it via ri:attachment (or the Mermaid/Draw.io macro if available)
Does not paste an external image URL
Keeps publishing as a separate [CONFIRM] step via confluence-draft
